title: Judicial Data & AI Governance Research Portfolio
description: Research portfolio on Judicial Data Governance, Digital Justice, Responsible AI and Public Sector Transformation in Africa. Maintained by DJORO Yoboukoua Lionel Arnaud as part of the Data Governance for Intelligent Justice Systems research programme.
